dataset.source: data.json (generated by AM-intel/scripts/build_dashboard.py from news_item/**/*.md frontmatter)
dataset.grain: one row per news_item note (unique note path)
dataset.traceability: each item carries `note` (relative path) back to the vault source file

x.note: last 20 ACTIVE days only; non-contiguous dates, stated in caption

interactions: click/Enter: toggle date filter (from = to = clicked day)
charts.zero_negative_policy: counts are >= 1 by construction (only active days plotted); absence of a date column means no backfill that day, stated in caption

interactions: click/Enter: toggle category filter (syncs select + highlight)
click/Enter: toggle region filter (syncs select + highlight)
charts.map_rejected_reason: region values mix granularities (continent-scale regions alongside United States / China); a map would imply unsupported geographic precision

cross_filter.semantics: charts update live with the query (2026-07-23); each chart excludes ITS OWN dimension's filter so switching remains possible — category chart responds to keyword+region+date, region chart to keyword+category+date, daily chart to keyword+region+category; active selection shown as highlight, not as a collapsed single-bar chart
cross_filter.row_order: fixed by overall (whole-database) count so bars animate in place instead of reordering
cross_filter.zero_values: true zero renders zero-length fill with count 0 visible as text; empty result set states '目前條件下無資料' in the caption
cross_filter.scale: per-chart linear max over the chart's current base subset

captions: computed at runtime from live data (bilingual zh/en) so numbers never go stale after daily refresh; under an active query captions restate the subset size; captions describe visible pattern only, no causal or advisory claims

carrier.offline: no external CDN; vanilla JS + CSS only; fonts are local-first with system fallbacks
carrier.print: @media print static state; interactive controls hidden; chart colors forced with print-color-adjust
